name: flywheel
description: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable, red-teamed goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate behind an independent second-view review), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor), and telegram-message (dispatch-gated Telegram DMs when a run errors, waits, or finishes).
